title: Skye Candy
description: Hypixel Skyblock resource pack by chandra.
body:
## Skye Candy Resource Pack 

**A Custom Resource Pack for Hypixel Skyblock (``play.hypixel.net``) that aims to maintain a consistent "candy" style by adding item sprites with bright colours and exciting designs to the custom items in the game!** 

_Check out the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/skye-candy/gallery) for examples of what to expect in the pack and join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/u5F88NCUhW) for leaks and notifications for upcoming updates!_

[Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) mods are **REQUIRED** to be installed for this pack to work
